summary: Completed testing of simplified inbox UI with All/Accounting/Sales tabs and stats strip. All backend tests pass (13/13). Frontend correctly displays simplified sidebar (3 items), stats strip (5 metrics), tabs with filtering, document table, bulk actions, and upload dialog.

issues:

inside

(Badge inside p tag) and containing wrapper around elements.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing documents from previous test iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simplified inbox UI fully tested. Sidebar reduced from 8+ items to 3 (Inbox, Pipeline Demo, Settings). Stats strip shows 5 metrics: Today count, Auto-validated %, Pending review, Qty alerts (conditional), AI confidence. Tabs (All/Accounting/Sales) filter documents by type. Document table has 6 columns: checkbox, Document, Vendor/Customer, Type, Status, Date, Actions. Bulk actions (Retry, File, Ref Intel, Delete) appear when docs selected. Upload dialog opens correctly. Document row click navigates to detail page (/documents/{id} or /review/{id} for sales). QTY ALERT badge shows on flagged documents.

backend: inbox-stats returns all 7 required fields (ingested_today, avg_daily_7d, auto_validation_rate, pending_review, bounds_alerts, avg_ai_confidence, total_documents) - PASS
inbox-stats field types are numeric - PASS
GET /api/documents returns 200 with documents list - PASS
